display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Liquid, publicly traded STRAIGHT
(option-free) bonds outstanding?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
YTM on a long-dated straight bond.
Most precise (live, market-clearing).
Strip out convertibles/callables

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Current issuer credit rating
(S&P / Moody's / Fitch)?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Risk-free + market default spread
for that rating (rating-implied)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SYNTHETIC RATING (Damodaran):
interest-coverage (EBIT / interest) -> rating
-> default spread (use the small-firm table
under ~$5bn). Pre-tax Kd = Rf + spread

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: After-tax Kd = pre-tax Kd x (1 - t)
